title: Badge: Budget Hero
resultSuccessText: You got {{score}} out of {{total}} challenges correct! You're a true Budget Hero!
resultSuccessLesson: Lesson: Smart budgeting helps you achieve your financial goals and build a secure future!
resultFailText: You got {{score}} out of {{total}} challenges correct. Practice makes perfect with budgeting!
resultFailTip: Tip: Remember to plan your budget, prioritize needs, save first, track regularly, and adjust as needed!

challenges.title: Budget Planning
challenges.question: What should you do first when creating a budget?

options.text: List all your income and expenses

challenges.title: Prioritizing Expenses
challenges.question: What should you prioritize in your budget?

options.text: Cover essential needs first, then wants

challenges.title: Saving Strategy
challenges.question: What's the best way to save money?

options.text: Save whatever is left after spending
Save first, then spend the rest
Save only when you have extra

challenges.title: Budget Tracking
challenges.question: How often should you review your budget?

options.text: Review it only once a year
Review it only when you run out of money

challenges.title: Budget Flexibility
challenges.question: What should you do if you overspend in one category?

options.text: Adjust other categories to stay within budget
